comment_content:
What hurts most about this loss is that we won’t get a more comfortable away fixture all season than Man United. I honestly can’t remember seeing a home side play that negatively. They’re clearly stumbling around in the dark trying to rediscover some kind of former glory. We had at least as many players missing as they did. Just imagine the meltdown if we, at home, had nicked a scrappy 1–0 against one of the league’s weakest away sides by parking the bus for an entire half.

Anyway, if we can’t win a game like this, it’s hard to stay optimistic about the rest of the season. Top six feels completely unrealistic when so many teams could go at least six points clear of us today. We can’t realistically expect to overhaul everyone, even if we manage to put a decent run together.
